hero.label: News & Updates
hero.title: From the studio.
hero.description: Development logs, announcements, and behind-the-scenes notes from the Cenoir team.

entries.title: Website Redesign Live
entries.text: The Cenoir Studios website has been rebuilt with separate sections for projects, news, and careers. The projects page now features a concept art gallery showcasing environment art from NoSaints: New Dawn.

entries.title: NoSaints: Combat System Progress
entries.text: The combat feature module is taking shape — states for melee, ranged, and ability-based actions are now running through the priority-based state machine. KINEMATION procedural animation is driving weapon sway and recoil.

entries.title: Movement System Overhaul
entries.text: The character movement feature has been refactored into a clean MVP + State Machine architecture. Idle, Move, Sprint, Jump, Crouch, and Slide states are now ScriptableObject-based and fully priority-driven.

entries.title: Environment Concept Art Reveal
entries.text: Seven new concept art pieces for NoSaints: New Dawn are now public — featuring the game's signature amber-lit cityscapes, industrial architecture, and the interior of the Blue Whale bar. Art by Andrey Ivasenko.

entries.title: Cenoir Studios Founded
entries.text: The official founding of Cenoir Studios. A small team, a big vision, and the beginning of NoSaints — our debut project.
